evals.prompt: Create an MR for the current branch. The repo uses GitLab and its default branch is develop.
evals.expected_output: Checks the default branch, compares commits against develop, generates a title and markdown description file, verifies glab is available, creates the MR, deletes the temp file after success, and reports the MR URL.

evals.prompt: Open a PR for this GitHub branch. Please base it on the repo default branch and write a useful description from the commits.
evals.expected_output: Detects GitHub, finds the default branch before comparing commits, uses gh pr create with a generated title and body file, and removes the temporary markdown file after successful creation.

evals.prompt: Create a merge request for my current branch, but I think this project uses main not develop.
evals.expected_output: Does not assume develop; determines origin's default branch first, falls back to main/develop only if needed, verifies commits exist, then creates the MR with the detected provider CLI.
